Basic Usage

 The most common use case for FormGroup is grouping checkboxes together with labels.

frontmatter.title: Form Group Code
frontmatter.description: FormGroup is a wrapper component used to group multiple form controls such as checkboxes or switches together, providing consistent spacing and layout.
